mapper.insert:
insert into `order`(user_id, goods_id, order_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) values
( #{order.userId}, #{order.goodsId}, #{order.orderId}, #{order.quantity}, #{order.createTime}, #{order.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.create_time, o.quantity, g.goods_name, g.goods_image, g.goods_price, g.goods_intro from `order` o left join goods g on o.goods_id = g.goods_id where o.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.create_time, o.quantity, g.goods_name, g.goods_image, g.goods_price, g.goods_intro from `order` o left join goods g on o.goods_id = g.goods_id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.order_id =#{orderId}
